message:
fix(test): schedule race winner on separate worker to avoid LIFO starvation

The e2e_race_loser_cancellation_drain test deterministically failed
because the winner task was on the same LIFO worker queue as the loser
tasks. Losers continuously re-enqueue after each yield, pushing the
winner to the bottom of the queue so it never runs within the 500-step
budget. Schedule the winner on worker 1 so it runs via steal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
